summary: Iteration 9: AI Code Generation with xAI Grok integration testing completed successfully. All backend API tests passed (11/11). Frontend ProjectPage with Quick/Multi-Agent modes working correctly. SSE streaming endpoint tested with all 6 agents (architect, frontend, backend, security, qa, devops).

issues: Doc files (_docs/*) in tab bar don't have data-testid attributes - only code files do

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ai/models returns 3 Grok models (grok-4-latest, grok-4-1-fast-reasoning, grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning) with credits
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate works in demo mode and returns code structure
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate returns parsed files field
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate deducts credits from user
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate updates project with generated content
Backend: GET /api/ai/generate-stream requires token query parameter (401 without)
Backend: SSE auth via token query parameter works (200 with text/event-stream)
Backend: SSE stream sends agent_start, agent_chunk, agent_complete events for all 6 agents
Backend: SSE stream saves files to project after completion
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate returns 402 when user has insufficient credits
Frontend: ProjectPage loads with AI Generator panel (left) and Code Editor (right)
Frontend: Quick/Multi-Agent mode toggle visible in chat header
Frontend: Mode toggle changes Generate button text (Quick: 'Generate Code', Multi: 'Build with 6 Agents')
Frontend: Model selector shows 3 Grok models with credit costs
Frontend: Credit Meter visible in project header (shows 1/10 STARTER)
Frontend: File tabs show generated doc files (_docs/architect_output.md, etc.)
Frontend: AI prompt input visible with helpful placeholder text
Frontend: Save and Deploy buttons visible in header
Frontend: Back to dashboard link works
Regression: Landing page loads with 'Powered by xAI Grok' badge
Regression: Landing page has Architecture, Deploy, Security sections
Regression: Login page has Forgot Password link
Regression: Dashboard shows Credit Meter and projects
Regression: Settings page Security tab shows 2FA with 'Enable 2FA' button
Regression: Pricing page shows all 5 plans (Starter, Standard, Pro, Premier, Ultra)
critical_code_review_comments: SSE endpoint correctly uses token query param for EventSource auth (since EventSource can't send headers)
Multi-agent pipeline runs 6 agents sequentially: architect, frontend, backend, security, qa, devops
Demo mode (no XAI_API_KEY) returns placeholder code - pipeline structure works correctly
File parsing regex extracts ```filename:xxx``` blocks from AI responses
Credits are deducted after SSE stream completion, not at start
Project files include _docs/ prefix for agent output documentation

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all ProjectPage features and regression tests passed)

test_credentials.note: User has 1/10 credits remaining after testing

seed_data_creation: Test user already existed with project 'Test AI Project' containing multi-agent generated docs
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Code Generation feature fully tested. Backend has POST /api/ai/generate (single) and GET /api/ai/generate-stream (SSE multi-agent). SSE uses token query param for auth. 6 agents run: architect, frontend, backend, security, qa, devops. Demo mode works without XAI_API_KEY - returns placeholder code. ProjectPage has Quick/Multi-Agent toggle, model selector with 3 Grok models, credit meter. Test user ai_test@example.com has 1 credit remaining.
mocked_apis_note: xAI Grok API returns DEMO placeholder code since XAI_API_KEY is empty. SSE pipeline and file parsing are fully functional with real implementation.
